author: Iliasdouk
title: Crashing
content: The app is way too confusing and complicated and I cannot listen to music without it crashing every 10 minutes also I am having problems trying to add new songs the app simply doesn’t recognize them. Waste of time and money

author: TinoKos78
title: Все бы не плохо
content: Жаль только что в самом приложении нельзя сохранять музыку, только лишь через облака… было бы не плохо скачивать музыку именно в приложение из интернета.

author: clavidis
title: Great work
content: One minor problem. In free version I was able to control playback from Lock Screen. In bought version Flacbox does not appear on controls.

author: ofiwhs
title: Great app for FLAC !
content: I tried a bunch of apps but this one had the best UI and many audio customization features...and just works great... Also you can connect other services to play them all in one app. Recommended!

author: Wisdomgodess
title: One of the best
content: I ve tried many but it's the only one that plays opus format on phone 👌🏻
